summary: Comprehensive testing of Trend Syria Internal Ads System (نظام إعلانات البائعين). All 23 backend API tests PASSED. Frontend UI testing completed successfully for Homepage Featured Products, Seller Ads Tab, and Admin Ads Tab.

issues: Minor console hydration warnings about span inside select/option - cosmetic only, not affecting functionality

passed_tests: ✅ Ad prices contain all required fields (featured_product_day/week/month, banner_day/week, search_top_day/week)
✅ All ad prices are positive numbers
✅ Featured products is list with correct structure (ad_id, product, is_featured)
✅ Seller's ads list has correct structure
✅ Admin ads include seller info (seller_id, seller_name)
✅ Admin stats contain required fields (total_ads, active_ads, total_revenue, total_views, total_clicks)
✅ Frontend: Homepage loads with Featured Products section
✅ Frontend: Featured product 'قميص رجالي كاجوال' displayed with badge
✅ Frontend: Seller dashboard has Ads tab (الإعلانات)
✅ Frontend: Seller Ads tab shows stats (active ads, views, clicks, spent)
✅ Frontend: Create Ad button opens modal
✅ Frontend: Create Ad modal has product select, ad type options, duration options, cost calculator
✅ Frontend: Admin dashboard has 'إدارة الإعلانات' button
✅ Frontend: Admin Ads tab shows stats (total ads, active ads, revenue, views, clicks)
✅ Frontend: Admin Ads tab has price editor section
✅ Frontend: Admin Ads tab has ads table with filter
critical_code_review_comments: Ads system is well-designed with proper role-based access control (seller for my-ads/create, admin for admin endpoints)
Featured products API correctly increments view count on each request
Ad prices are configurable by admin and stored in settings collection
Wallet balance deduction works correctly when creating ads
Frontend components use data-testid attributes for reliable testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data. Seller has 1 active featured product ad for 'قميص رجالي كاجوال'
context_for_next_testing_agent: Ads system fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/ads/prices (public), GET /api/ads/featured-products (public), GET /api/ads/my-ads (seller), POST /api/ads/create (seller), GET /api/ads/admin/all (admin), GET /api/ads/admin/stats (admin), PUT /api/ads/admin/prices (admin). Default prices: featured_product_day=5000, week=25000, month=80000; banner_day=15000, week=70000; search_top_day=10000, week=50000 ل.س

list: POST /api/payment/verify-otp - ShamCash payment verification accepts any 6-digit OTP for testing

ads_backend.featured_products_api: Working - returns active featured products with increment views
ads_backend.my_ads_api: Working - seller can see their ads with stats
ads_backend.create_ad_api: Working - validates product, checks wallet balance, deducts cost
ads_backend.admin_all_api: Working - admin can view all ads with filter
ads_backend.admin_stats_api: Working - returns total/active ads, revenue, views, clicks
ads_backend.admin_prices_api: Working - admin can update ad prices

ads_frontend.homepage_featured_section: Working - shows sponsored products with badge
ads_frontend.seller_ads_tab: Working - shows stats, ads list, create button
ads_frontend.create_ad_modal: Working - product select, type/duration options, cost calculator
ads_frontend.admin_ads_tab: Working - shows stats, price editor, ads table with filter
